automatic-translation-desc: Waxay bixisaa [[Special:AutomaticTranslation|tarjumaad otomaatig ah]] oo loogu talagalay bogagga nuxurka.
mint-home-info-panel-text: Malaayiin mawduuc oo ku jira Wikipedia ayaa si otomaatig ah loogu tarjumi karaa $1.
ax-home-random-topic-error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la soo qaadanayay mawduuc aan kala sooc lahayn.
ax-home-error-title: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la soo qaadanayay maqaalka $1.
mint-home-experimental-note: Taageerada tarjumaadda otomaatiga ah waa tijaabo. [$1 Baro wax badan]
mint-search-topic-page-results-container: Raadi mawduuc kasta. Waxyaabaha ku jira mawduuc waxay ku kala duwanaan karaan luqad kasta.
mint-confirm-topic-page-language-selecto: Tarjumaad [$1 oo ka yimid Wikipedia ee $2]. Sahami sida mawduucan loogu soo bandhigay {{PLURAL:$3|luqad kale|$3 luqadood oo kale}}.
mint-confirm-topic-page-target-article-l: Maqaalkan waxaa lagu qoray $1 oo ay qoreen tafatirayaal bini’aadam ah. Waxaad ku biiri kartaa si aad u hagaajiso waxa ku jira.
mint-view-translation-page-disclaimer-he: Waxyaabaha otomaatiga ah waxaa laga yaabaa in ay khaldan yihiin
mint-view-translation-page-disclaimer-bo: Boggan waxaa si otomaatig ah looga turjumay nuxur asal ahaan lagu qoray $1.
mint-view-translation-page-target-articl: Waxyaabo ay abuureen bini’aadam ayaa sidoo kale laga heli karaa mawduucan
Ka akhri maqaalka Wikipedia ee $1 si aad u hesho macluumaad la isku halleyn karo oo ku saabsan mawduucan.
mint-view-translation-content-translatio: Dib u eeg tarjumaadda otomaatigga ah
Waxyaabaha otomaatiga ah waxaa laga yaabaa inay khaldan yihiin
ax-article-footer-entrypoint-card-descri: Waxyaabo badan oo ku qoran luqado kale
mint-explore-languages-explanation-banne: Wax badan ka baro luuqado kale
Tafatirayaal ku kala jira luuqado kala duwan ayaa mawduucan u soo bandhigay siyaabo kala duwan.
mint-explore-languages-language-card-con: Luuqadaha leh caymiska ugu badan ee "$1"
mint-explore-languages-loading-error: Lama awoodin in la hor eego waxa ku jira luuqad kasta. Dooro luuqad si aad u isticmaasho ilaha tarjumaadda otomaatiga ah.
ax-cx-introduction-dialog-title: Dib u eeg oo sax tarjumaadaha
ax-cx-introduction-summary: Hagaaji waxyaabaha ku jira luuqaddaada. Qor tarjumaad ka wanaagsan, kadibna ku daabac Wikipedia.
ax-cx-introduction-information-accuracy: Turjumaadda otomaatiga ah waxay bixisaa dulmar faa’iido leh, laakiin mar walba sax ma aha.
ax-cx-introduction-information-expand: Waxyaabaha ay qoreen bini’aadamku waa kuwo la isku halleyn karo, adiguna waxaad ka caawin kartaa ballaarintooda!
ax-cx-introduction-information-correct: Raac hab fudud oo tallaabo tallaabo ah si aad dib ugu eegto oo u saxdo turjumaadaha otomaatiga ah ee jumlad kasta.
ax-translation-view-feedback-title: Turjumaadda otomaatiga ah ma kaa caawisaa inaad wax badan barato?
ax-translation-view-feedback-privacy-sta: Macluumaad dheeraad ah, eeg bayaanka sirta ee  [https://foundation.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Policy:Privacy_policy sahankan].
ax-translation-view-feedback-details-que: Kee baa ku raacsan tahay kuwan soo socda?
ax-translation-view-feedback-positive-mi: Waxay i siisay helitaan macluumaad ay adag tahay in meel kale laga helo.
ax-translation-view-feedback-positive-tr: Tayada turjumaaddu waa mid ku filan oo si kalsooni leh loogu fahmi karo waxa ku jira.
ax-translation-view-feedback-positive-qu: Si dhakhso ah ayaan u heli karaa faham guud oo ku saabsan mawduuca.
ax-translation-view-feedback-positive-te: Arrimaha farsamada sida waqtiga soo gelitaanka ma carqaladeyn barashada.
ax-translation-view-feedback-negative-mi: Waxaan ka heli karaa macluumaad ka wanaagsan meel kale.
ax-translation-view-feedback-negative-tr: Tayada turjumaaddu ma aha mid ku filan oo si kalsooni leh loogu fahmi karo waxa ku jira.
ax-translation-view-feedback-negative-qu: Si degdeg ah uma heli karo faham guud oo ku saabsan mawduuca.
ax-translation-view-feedback-negative-te: Arrimaha farsamada sida waqtiga soo gelitaanka waxay carqaladeynayeen barashada.
ax-translation-view-feedback-confirm-des: Waad ku mahadsan tahay caawinta! Waxaad la wadaagi kartaa fikradaha kale ee aad ka qabto tijaabadan [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Talk:MinT bogga wada-hadalka mashruuca].
